name: SKELETON_PATHWAY__RANK_BY_PATENT_COUNT__TARGET_PAIR__ALL_TIME
macro_frame_family_zh: 按专利量排序的靶点对排名
description: Independent frame skeleton for ranking target pairs by patent count under a pathway constraint.
cypher_template:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10
examples: Among target pairs related to the ROS and RNS production in phagocytes pathway, which ones have the most patents? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the Formation of the ureteric bud pathway, which ones have the most patents? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the Cytokine Signaling in Immune system pathway, which ones have the most patents? Please return the top 10.
